heading: Get your perfect smile in four simple steps

steps.title: Scan
steps.desc: Book a free home scan or visit a Clove clinic. Our expert takes a 3D scan of your teeth.

steps.title: Plan
steps.desc: Our orthodontists design a customized 3D plan showing the transition of your teeth.

steps.title: Fabricate
steps.desc: We manufacture your custom aligners using medical-grade material.

steps.title: Wear
steps.desc: Start wearing your aligners. Get virtual supervision and in-person checkups.
